mapper.select:
SELECT D.DEP_ID AS code, D.DEP_NM AS name FROM SMS.DEP D WHERE D.ACT_YN = 'Y'
AND (D.DEP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR D.DEP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY D.DEP_NM, D.DEP_ID

SELECT R.ROLE_CD AS code, R.ROLE_NM AS name FROM SMS.TB_ROLE R WHERE R.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND (R.ROLE_CD LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR R.ROLE_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY R.SORT_ORD, R.ROLE_CD
